use_cases: Full-screen animated background for landing pages or hero sections
Dynamic visualization element for creative or generative art tools
Decorative animated component for media or entertainment applications
Background element for SaaS dashboards or product showcases
Ambient visual element for digital art installations
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based radial visualization that renders animated, colorful patterns using mathematical color cycling and radial segmentation. The component creates overlapping radial bands with smooth transitions, animated by time-based rotation and color modulation. Built as a standalone visual effect that adapts to its container dimensions using standard shader uniforms.
